scripts.build: npm run build:brickout && npm run build:pong-game && npm run build:roids && npm run build:sentra-pede && npm run build:face-invaders && npm run build:conflict && cp index.html dist/
scripts.build:brickout: cd brickout && npm install && npm run build && cp ../shared/touch-controller.js ../dist/brickout/
scripts.build:pong-game: cd pong-game && npm install && npm run build && cp ../shared/touch-controller.js ../dist/pong-game/
scripts.build:roids: cp -r roids/public dist/roids && cp shared/touch-controller.js dist/roids/
scripts.build:sentra-pede: mkdir -p dist/sentra-pede && cp -r sentra-pede/public/* dist/sentra-pede/ && cp shared/touch-controller.js dist/sentra-pede/
scripts.build:face-invaders: mkdir -p dist/face-invaders && cp -r face-invaders/public/* dist/face-invaders/ && cp shared/touch-controller.js dist/face-invaders/
scripts.build:conflict: mkdir -p dist/conflict && cp -r conflict/public/* dist/conflict/ && cp shared/touch-controller.js dist/conflict/
